name: Sourdough Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add egg and mix until blended.
3. Stir in bananas and sourdough starter. Mix in orange peel or vanilla.
4. Gradually add flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda. Combine thoroughly.
5. Fold in chopped walnuts.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool completely before slicing.
